results.justification: EXACT TWIN — MSSR explicitly models memory retention as time-dependent decay + inverse-retention weighted replay IS the patina-aging per-sample loss-weight mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — FOREVER forgetting-curve replay with virtual Ebbinghaus days IS the per-sample timestamped patina schedule paradigm.
Dual-learner fast+slow LoRA + EMA merge + surprise-prioritized replay covers the dual-rate patina + reservoir mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — HypoTermInstruct targeted SFT for epistemological humility IS the cracked-bowl epistemic-humility reservoir mechanism.
Noise injection capturing epistemic + aleatoric uncertainty IS the cracked-bowl noise reservoir for epistemic humility.
Engineering procedures for epistemic stability + hallucination reduction covers the epistemic-humility + decay-control paradigm.
TInt dynamic + static noise injection in CoT training covers the controlled-imperfection reservoir mechanism.
Scalable continual-learning replay with adaptive scheduling covers the replay buffer + decay schedule paradigm.
